creator: mk@nic-nac-project.org
text:
Created attachment 196773
svn diff to upgrade dsbmc-0.4 to dsbmc-0.5

Changes:

- A bug in the force-unmount dialog has been fixed.
- Support for accessing disk images has been added.

Release notes: https://freeshell.de/~mk/projects/dsbmc-relnotes.html

QA:
portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 104Ri386, 112Ramd64)
